title: Element of Crime in Wenn es dunkel und kalt wird in Berlin
original_title: Element of Crime in Wenn es dunkel und kalt wird in Berlin
overview: In the summer of 2023, the band Element of Crime will embark on a week-long tour of Berlin - not just a tour of various concert venues, but also a journey through their own stories and memories, a homage to their city.
